summary: Crisp soundboard capture of a historic Greek run with standout second‑set ballads and strong Playing in the Band, though mix issues and technical glitches temper the experience.
review: The Miller transfer delivers a clear soundboard image of the first night of the 20th‑anniversary Greek shows, highlighting three sweet Jerry ballads and a powerful Playing > China Doll > Comes A Time sequence. Reviewers note some mix problems—Jerry often buried—and a mid‑set technical break that forced a pause, but the unique setlist (first Morning Dew to open a set, first “Keep On Growing” cover) makes it worth downloading for historical value.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise the performance and soundboard clarity (average 4‑star ratings), but several point out mix imbalances and technical glitches, pulling the overall score toward a solid four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp overall soundboard quality noted, but some sound problems (Jerry low in mix), a goofy sound montage before Dew, and labeling errors. Technical break halfway through the show caused additional glitches.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers admire the varied set‑list and historic moments (first Morning Dew to open a set, first “Keep On Growing” cover), though a mid‑show technical pause disrupts flow. The second set is praised for its ballads and seamless transitions.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Often low in the mix according to one reviewer, but his three ballads in the second set are highlighted as sweet moments.
